title: (incorrect) MAL loop instead of manifold triggered by simple change in target list
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE input_double (a1 VARCHAR(255), a2 FLOAT, prob FLOAT);
INSERT INTO input_double (a1, a2, prob) VALUES ('latitude', 34.0522, 0.9);
INSERT INTO input_double (a1, a2, prob) VALUES ('longitude', -118.2437, 0.8);
CREATE TABLE v(a1 INT, a2 POINT, prob FLOAT);

INSERT INTO v (a1, a2, prob) SELECT sys.point(tmp_2.a2, tmp_3.a2) AS a1, prob AS prob FROM (SELECT a2, prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'latitude') AS tmp_2, (SELECT a2, prob FROM input_double WHERE a1 = 'longitude') AS tmp_3;
key_bug_features: MAL loop triggered by target list change
